item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Jesus Christ! Someone does not like Girl Scouts or their cookies!!
Honestly though, good read. I thoroughly enjoyed it. Taking something so mundane and every day, such as most people's seemingly addictive tendencies towards Girl Scout cookies, especially Thin Mints, and turning it into something anomalous. I don't think I ever would have thought of that. And on that note, that guy's Twitter handle is very appropriate. He is a monster!
It does make me wonder what an all out war between the Girl Scouts and The Foundation would look like.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like this! It's kind of strange that you decided to make an SCP out of a mere phrase but this worked! My only real nitpick is that I don't see the need for both a letter and an email by Carla, it feels… stretched out, in my opinion. I feel that using just the email and possibly editing it a bit would be sufficient, but the response by the Site Director was fine.

All in all, a very fine job! It's made in a very much presentable way and gets the message across nice and quickly without any extended, 30-minute read. +1

item.title: Hey!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks so much to the people who took their time to look at my draft.

+ Acknowledgements
- Close

Special thanks to these people for their help with my draft!
BoomerTheStar47_2 Last minute SPaG check, life saver.
Doctor Fullham SPaG and Encouragement, thanks!
Calibri Bold SPaG, Encouragement. Thank you!

+ Sources
- Close

https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Little_Brownie_Bakers_Thin_Mints_on_a_plate_1.jpg

The twitter post I obviously made.

This is the first of many, (a foundation - if you would) of girl scout things I plan for the future, as a new GoI. This is the first piece, and is about why you can't say no when they come knocking!

Thanks for reading!
